notes: Audience-member events use Mailchimp's webhook subscriptions (lists/{id}/webhooks). Audience/campaign/store-level resources are polled via the API.

triggers.name: Link Clicked
triggers.description: Fires when a recipient clicks a pre-specified link in a campaign.

triggers.name: New Audience
triggers.description: Fires when a new audience (list) is added to your Mailchimp account.

triggers.name: New Campaign
triggers.description: Fires when a new campaign is created or sent.

triggers.name: New Customer
triggers.description: Fires when a new customer is added to a selected store.

triggers.name: New or Updated Subscriber
triggers.description: Fires when a subscriber is added or updated in an audience.

triggers.name: New Subscriber
triggers.description: Fires when a new subscriber is added to an audience.

triggers.name: New Unsubscriber
triggers.description: Fires when any current subscriber unsubscribes from an audience.
